nasb.text: Then he put garrisons in Edom, and all the Edomites became servants to David. And the Lord helped David wherever he went.

esv.text: Then he put garrisons in Edom, and all the Edomites became David’s servants. And the Lord gave victory to David wherever he went.

cnv.text: 大衛在以東設立駐防營，所有以東人就都臣服大衛。大衛無論到甚麼地方去，耶和華都使他得勝。

ccb.text: 大卫在以东驻兵，以东人都臣服他。耶和华使他无往而不胜。
